scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@finastra/types && npm run build --workspace=@finastra/api && npm run build --workspace=@finastra/web
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=@finastra/types && npm run lint --workspace=@finastra/api && npm run lint --workspace=@finastra/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@finastra/types && npm run typecheck --workspace=@finastra/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=@finastra/web
